display.purpose: The single h1 per page (.page-header h1).

headline.purpose: Panel and card headers (.panel h2, .card h2).

metric.purpose: The big number in a metric tile (.metric strong).

body.purpose: Default reading text; cap measure at 65-75ch.

mono.purpose: IDs, codes, raw JSON — inspector only.

shadows.name: shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Buttons and the sticky topbar at rest.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Standard lift for primary surfaces (panel, metric, card, inspector-panel, tabs).

shadows.name: shadow-popup
shadows.purpose: Modals only, over a blurred backdrop.

motion.name: transition-control
motion.value: background 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease, transform 80ms ease

motion.name: popup-enter
motion.purpose: Modal panel entrance (paired with a 160ms backdrop fade).

breakpoints.name: compact
breakpoints.purpose: Identity and operative grids collapse to a single column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button; the bare <button> is the primary.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Non-primary action; sand fill with a hairline border.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field with the accent-halo focus ring.

components.name: Metric Tile
components.description: Compact tile: muted label over a big honest number. A count or a link, never a hero band.

components.name: Status Segmented Toggle
components.description: Signature control: a pill track where the current state is filled with its earthen tint; the others POST a change on click.

components.name: Pill Tabs
components.description: Signature tab pattern (Tab_Navigator.js): pill track, active tab filled Deep Pine.

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Topbar link; active state is a Mint Mist pill with Deep Pine text.

narrative.overview: YoAyudo is the calm wooden counter of a small shop, rendered as software. The owner stands at it, glances down, and reads exactly how the day is going — sales, cash, open tasks, what the bot handled over WhatsApp — without studying anything. Everything that matters is within arm's reach; nothing shouts. The surface is warm paper (#f6f4ee), the ink is a soft near-black (#1a1a16), and a single petrol-emerald (#0f6a5a) marks the few things you can act on. It is the opposite of a control room: no banks of instruments, no gauges blinking for attention, no jargon. Depth comes from soft layered shadows rather than hard 1px boxes. The accent is rationed: emerald belongs to primary actions and live states, never to decoration or navigation. Two audiences share the system but not the same dial: the business owner gets the plain, generous, owner-first surface that is the product being sold; the platform operator gets denser inspector/admin tooling behind the same tokens. When the two conflict, the owner's clarity wins.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-paper canvas, soft near-black ink, one rationed petrol-emerald accent.
Layered soft shadows for depth; nested elements go flat (no card-in-card).
Plain Spanish (es-MX) business language; engine internals stay in the inspector.
Honest states only: real activity or a clear empty state — never fake numbers.
Owner-first calm over operator density when the two pull apart.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Petrol-emerald is reserved for primary actions and live states. Navigation, decoration, and chrome use neutrals — never the accent. If emerald is everywhere, it means nothing.

rules.name: The Earthen-Status Rule
rules.body: Status color is always a muted earthen pair (tinted bg + same-hue darker ink), never saturated ink on white. Status must also carry a word or icon, never color alone.

rules.name: The Legibility Rule
rules.body: Olive Muted (#6c6f64) is for labels and secondary text, not body copy on tinted surfaces. If a muted value lands near a paper/sand tint and contrast is borderline, push it toward Ink. Washed-out gray-on-cream is the failure mode; refuse it.

rules.name: The Brand-Weight Rule
rules.body: The wordmark YoAyudo is the heaviest type in the product (800, -0.01em). Nothing else competes at that weight.

rules.name: The Eyebrow-With-A-Job Rule
rules.body: The uppercase tracked label is allowed only when it names entity type or scope (Negocio, Cuenta, panel subhead). It is forbidden as a decorative kicker above every section.

rules.name: The Flat-Nest Rule
rules.body: A surface lifts once. Rows and cards inside a lifted panel are flat. Two stacked shadows = nested cards = forbidden.

rules.name: The Frosted-Topbar Exception
rules.body: The only sanctioned glass is the sticky topbar: near-opaque warm fill rgba(250,249,245,0.94) with a faint blur(6px). Glassmorphism is not a general material.

dos: Do keep the accent rationed — Petrol Emerald only on primary actions and live states (the One Accent Rule).
Do lift primary surfaces once with shadow-sm and keep nested rows flat (the Flat-Nest Rule).
Do translate engine internals into plain Spanish business language (Venta registrada, Tarea abierta, Caja inicial del día).
Do show honest states: real activity or a clear empty state, and only render an operational panel when a bot actually declares that capability.
Do carry status as an earthen tint pair plus a word/icon, never color alone.
Do reuse the core components — button, .status-toggle, .tabs, Popup.js, +breadcrumb — instead of inventing new chrome.
Do keep the :root tokens in dashboard.css as the single source of truth; never hardcode a hex.
donts: Don't build the owner's surface like an airplane cockpit — nada de tableros de avión, no debe ser UI complejo. Progressive disclosure over a wall of controls.
Don't ship decorative or vanity dashboards: no chart-junk, no placeholder metrics, no three $0 tiles.
Don't leak raw technology into the owner's view — no raw payloads, processing events, or JSON. That lives only in the inspector.
Don't overwhelm with enterprise density: don't cram every control onto one screen.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe; use a full border or a tinted background instead.
Don't use gradient text or decorative glassmorphism; the only sanctioned frost is the topbar.
Don't set body or placeholder text in faint gray on a tinted surface.
Don't add a decorative uppercase eyebrow above every section; the tracked label is allowed only when it names entity type or scope.
Don't nest cards inside cards, or stack two shadows on one element.
